headline: New Fluke FEV500 Redefines Testing for Fast DC Electric Vehicle Chargers, Eliminating Costly Downtime
summary: As one in five charging stations sits offline, Fluke’s new FEV500 acts as a “virtual EV,” combining safety, communication, and interoperability checks in one tool - bringing data-driven reliability to the world’s fastest-growing charging segment New Fluke FEV500 Redefines Testing for Fast DC Electric Vehicle Chargers, Eliminating Costly Downtime Fluke’s new FEV500 acts as a “virtual EV,” combining safety, communication, and interoperability checks in one tool New Fluke FEV500 Redefines Testing f

headline: FUJIFILM Q4 Earnings & Revenues Up Y/Y on Solid Segmental Performance
summary: FUJIY posted record Q4 revenue and profit as healthcare, semiconductor materials and imaging demand lifted results and fueled upbeat FY2026 outlook.

headline: Fortive Announces Pricing of Offering of Senior Notes
summary: EVERETT, Wash., May 12, 2026--Fortive Corporation ("Fortive") (NYSE: FTV) today announced that it has priced its registered offering (the "offering") of $600 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.750% Notes due 2031 (the "2031 notes") and $500 million aggregate principal amount of its 5.250% Notes due 2036 (the "2036 notes" and, together with the 2031 notes, the "notes"). The 2031 notes will bear interest at 4.750% per annum and mature on May 15, 2031, and the 2036 notes will bear interest

content.title: Fortive Announces Pricing of Offering of Senior Notes
content.summary: EVERETT, Wash., May 12, 2026--Fortive Corporation ("Fortive") (NYSE: FTV) today announced that it has priced its registered offering (the "offering") of $600 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.750% Notes due 2031 (the "2031 notes") and $500 million aggregate principal amount of its 5.250% Notes due 2036 (the "2036 notes" and, together with the 2031 notes, the "notes"). The 2031 notes will bear interest at 4.750% per annum and mature on May 15, 2031, and the 2036 notes will bear interest
